"'''Finder's Fee'''" was a short story written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]], originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]] by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] [[1995]] and later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Loh'khar]] arranges transit for some [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] on the run from his base of operations within [[Lorana's Labyrinth]] in exchange for a copy of their freshly acquired [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] intelligence.

==Continuity==
This very short story was presented as an introduction to ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' boxed set that [[West End Games]] was then publishing.<ref name="TERC" />
